title: E-commerce Enablement Executive
description:
As an E-commerce Enablement Executive, you will be the driving force behind the success of major international brands across various digital marketplaces. You will act as a strategic partner to brand owners, managing everything from high-level digital marketing roadmaps to the granular details of warehouse fulfillment. Your goal is to blend operational excellence with data-driven marketing to maximize revenue, ensure brand integrity, and exceed marketplace KPIs.

Key Responsibilities

Operational Excellence & Marketplace Management

  • End-to-End Operations: Direct the daily operations of assigned brands across multiple marketplaces (e.g., Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, Zalora, Tik Tok) to ensure seamless store performance.
  • Onboarding & Optimization: Lead the onboarding process for new brands, overseeing product listings, SEO optimization, and marketplace campaign registrations.
  • Compliance & Guidelines: Ensure all visual assets, product copy, and communications strictly adhere to global brand guidelines and local consumer regulations.

Strategic Growth & Digital Marketing

  • Marketing Roadmaps: Design, plan, and execute comprehensive digital marketing roadmaps for major campaign launches (e.g., 11.11, Black Friday, Seasonal Sales).
  • Revenue Optimization: Coordinate with internal and external stakeholders to implement strategies that drive sustainable revenue growth and profitability.
  • Stakeholder Alignment: Align business objectives with brand owners, developing resource allocation plans and implementing bespoke strategies based on specific brand requirements.

Supply Chain & Performance Tracking

  • Fulfillment Coordination: Liaise closely with the warehouse team to ensure inventory is accurately received and orders are processed within strict SLA targets.
  • KPI Accountability: Maintain full accountability for marketplace KPIs (e.g., chat response rates, fulfillment rates, return rates), ensuring brands consistently exceed platform benchmarks. 
  • Internal Synergy: Partner with internal cross-functional teams to uphold high service standards and maximize customer satisfaction.

Market Intelligence & Analytics

  • Data Translation: Translate raw operational and sales data into actionable strategic insights regarding customer behavior and competitive positioning.
  • Trend Analysis: Monitor and analyze competitor sales and market trends to provide brand owners with data-driven insights for strategic decision-making.

Additional Duties

  • Perform additional duties as assigned by senior management to support evolving business needs and organizational growth.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Experience: 2–4 years of experience in E-commerce operations or account management, preferably managing international brands.
  • Platform Expertise: Proficiency in marketplace seller centers (e.g., Shopee Seller Centre, Lazada Seller Center, Amazon Seller Central).
  • Analytical Mindset: Strong ability to interpret data and use tools like Excel or BI software to drive strategy.
  • Marketing Savvy: Proven track record in planning digital campaigns and understanding SEO/SEM principles.
  • Communication: Exceptional stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence brand owners and internal teams.
  • Agility: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt to the ever-changing e-commerce landscape.


Why Join Us?

You will have the opportunity to manage a portfolio of world-class brands, giving you a front-row seat to the evolution of digital retail. We offer a collaborative environment where data-driven ideas are encouraged and professional growth is prioritized.

postedCompany.description:
YCH Group is one of Asia's leading supply chain and logistics conglomerates and partners some of the world’s largest companies and brands in more than 100 cities across Asia Pacific.


As a renowned 7PLᴛᴍ supply chain and logistics provider, our team of supply chain specialists, logisticians, technology disruptors, planners and other specialists, work together to achieve the common goal to be the partner of choice for integrated end-to-end supply chain management.


We deploy award winning supply chain solutions to serve multisector clients.


YCH values employees and advocate lifelong learning for employees to develop their career. As part our YCH’s LEARNTM ecosystem, talent enablement, learning and innovation have always been a huge part of our DNA.


Together with our affiliated companies, we remain steadfast in our mission to integrate data flows in the supply chain with unique analytics capabilities, coupled with domain expertise and innovation to transform and provide end-to-end supply chain enablement to connect ASEAN and beyond.
postedCompany.name: YCH GROUP PTE LTD
